name: fun-rpc
description: Monitor and broadcast your daily coding times and projects directly to your Discord profile presence.
author: nourbassem

commands.title: Enable Discord Presence in the current workspace
Disable Discord Presence in the current workspace

fun-rpc.app.name.description:
Choose the name you want the application to use.
Choosing "Custom" will make it so it use the "rpc.id" as application id

fun-rpc.app.id.description: Application id that will be used when `appName` is "Custom" or when `appName` is invalid

fun-rpc.app.privacyMode.enable.description: Should we hide the github repository, the file name and the workspace name?

fun-rpc.app.whitelistIsBlacklist.description: Switches the whitelist to a blacklist.

fun-rpc.app.whitelist.description: List of discord user ids that will be able to use the extension.

fun-rpc.status.resetElapsedTimePerFile.description: Should we reset the elapsed time after switching file?

fun-rpc.status.problems.text.description: This text will be shown when there is a problem.

fun-rpc.status.problems.countedSeveritie.description: List of problem level to count for `problems_count`.

fun-rpc.status.idle.check.description: Should we check when you are idling?

fun-rpc.status.idle.enabled.description:
Should we enable the idle status? 
If disabled, the extension will only show a plain card with VS Code logo when idling.

fun-rpc.status.idle.disconnectOnIdle.description:
Should going idle disconnect you from Discord gateway? 
If enabled, VS Code activity card will disappear from Discord at all when idling.

fun-rpc.status.idle.resetElapsedTime.description: Should going idle reset the elapsed time on the last active file? Only applies if "Disconnect on Idle" is enabled.

fun-rpc.status.idle.timeout.description: Time in seconds before the user is considered idle.

fun-rpc.ignore.workspaces.description: A list of workspace (name / path) to ignore.

fun-rpc.ignore.workspacesText.description: The text / object to show in the status when current workspace is ignored, when using the object, key is workspace name and value is the text.

fun-rpc.ignore.repositories.description: A list of repository name to ignore.

fun-rpc.ignore.organizations.description: A list of git organizations to ignore.

fun-rpc.ignore.gitHosts.description: A list of git host to ignore.

fun-rpc.status.details.idle.enabled.description: Should details be shown when idling?

fun-rpc.status.details.text.idle.description: The text to show when idling.

fun-rpc.status.details.text.editing.description: The text to show when editing a file.

fun-rpc.status.details.text.debugging.description: The text to show when debugging.

fun-rpc.status.details.text.viewing.description: The text to show when viewing a file.

fun-rpc.status.details.text.notInFile.description: The text to show when you are not in a file.

fun-rpc.status.details.text.noWorkSpaceT.description: The text to show when you are not in a workspace and there is no workspace text.

fun-rpc.status.state.debugging.enabled.description: Should state be shown when debugging? If disabled, it will be shown when editing/viewing a file.

fun-rpc.status.state.idle.enabled.description: Should state be shown when idling?

fun-rpc.status.state.text.idle.description: The text to show when idling.

fun-rpc.status.state.text.editing.description: The text to show when editing a file.

fun-rpc.status.state.text.debugging.description: The text to show when debugging.

fun-rpc.status.state.text.viewing.description: The text to show when viewing a file.

fun-rpc.status.state.text.notInFile.description: The text to show when you are not in a file.

fun-rpc.status.state.text.noWorkspaceFou.description: The text to show when no workspace is found.

fun-rpc.status.image.large.idle.key.description: The image url to use when idling

fun-rpc.status.image.large.idle.text.description: The large text to show when idling.

fun-rpc.status.image.large.viewing.key.description: The image url to use when viewing a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.large.viewing.text.description: The large text to show when viewing a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.large.editing.key.description: The image url to use when editing a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.large.editing.text.description: The large text to show when editing a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.large.debugging.key.description: The image url to use when debugging.

fun-rpc.status.image.large.debugging.tex.description: The large text to show when debugging

fun-rpc.status.image.large.notInFile.key.description: The image url to use when you are not in a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.large.notInFile.tex.description: The large text to show when you are not in a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.small.idle.key.description: The image url to use when idling.

fun-rpc.status.image.small.idle.text.description: The small text to show when idling.

fun-rpc.status.image.small.viewing.key.description: The image url to use when viewing a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.small.viewing.text.description: The small text to show when viewing a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.small.editing.key.description: The image url to use when editing a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.small.editing.text.description: The small text to show when editing a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.small.debugging.key.description: The image url to use when debugging.

fun-rpc.status.image.small.debugging.tex.description: The small text to show when debugging.

fun-rpc.status.image.small.notInFile.key.description: The image url to use when you are not in a file.

fun-rpc.status.image.small.notInFile.tex.description: The small text to show when you are not in a file.

fun-rpc.status.buttons.markdownDescription:
The buttons to show in the rich presence. You can set the first and second button (1 & 2).  
The valid config for the buttons are active, inactive, idle. Git has its own idle and active buttons.

fun-rpc.file.size.round.description: The number of decimal places to round the file size to.

fun-rpc.file.size.spacer.description: Spacer between the number and the unit.

fun-rpc.behaviour.additionalFileMapping.description: Additional regex to check for language, key is regex and value is the language.

fun-rpc.behaviour.suppressNotifications.description: Suppresses all notifications from the extension.

fun-rpc.behaviour.statusBarAlignment.description: Changing the alignment of the status bar.

fun-rpc.file.size.humanReadable.description: If true, the file size will be displayed in a human readable format (e.g. 1.2 MB). If false, the file size will be displayed in bytes.

fun-rpc.file.size.standard.description: The unit standard to use when displaying the file size.

virtualWorkspaces.description: Cannot access local Discord RPC when running in virtual workspace
